title: FAMILY CONNECTS - 211info
text: UNITED COMMUNITY ACTION NETWORK MARTHA YOUNG FAMILY SERVICE CENTER FAMILY CONNECTS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A nurse visiting program that offers up to four scheduled nurse visits to support families with a newborn. Provides overall health checks, help with feeding and bathing, and support for birthing parents with postpartum depression. Nurses also help connect families with community resources to promote parents’ health and children’s well-being. 280 NE Kenneth Ford Drive Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: Birth, adoptive, or resource families with a newborn 0-12 weeks Hours: No standard hours (541) 440-3622 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 673-6306 Main phone (800) 320-6306 Toll-free Main phone (541) 440-3622 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, email, or visit the website for information or to request a visit if one was not set up at the hospital. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Douglas County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located in the old Rose School building Services: Breastfeeding Support Programs General Expectant/New Parent Assistance Prenatal/Postnatal Home Visitation Programs Teen Expectant/New Parent Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - EARLY HEAD START EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - HEAD START INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BABIES FIRST! INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CACOON PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. UNITED COMMUNITY ACTION NETWORK MARTHA YOUNG FAMILY SERVICE CENTER
